name: Maple Baked Ham
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Maple syrup per 5 lb. ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from the ham.
2. Place the ham in a shallow roasting pan.
3. Bake at 325°F for about 20 minutes per pound.
4. When the ham is about half done, remove the drippings and set aside.
5. Pour maple syrup over the ham.
6. Baste every 20 minutes until the ham is fully cooked.
7. Remove the ham from the oven.
8. Strain the maple-flavored drippings into a saucepan.
9. Add the remaining drippings to what has been set aside and heat.
10. Thicken with flour; serve as a sauce.
